channel.title: Pigsty – Category: FEAT
channel.description: Recent content in Category: FEAT on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: age
item.description:
Overview

PIGSTY 3rd Party Extension: age : AGE graph database extension

Information

  • ID: 1700
  • Name: age
  • Alias: age
  • Category: FEAT
  • Website: https://github.com/apache/age
  • License: Apache-2.0 License
  • Language: Unknown
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 1.5.0
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: ag_catalog
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PIGSTY
  • RPM Name: apache-age_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 1.5.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PGDG
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-age
  • DEB Ver : 1.5.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details
